name: Bethlehem
oracleText:
Bethlehem, City of David enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {W}.
Whenever a legendary creature enters the battlefield under your control, you gain 1 life.
flavorText: "Unto you is born this day in the city of David a Saviour, which is Christ the Lord." — Luke 2:11
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "Saint Joseph Seeks a Lodging in Bethlehem" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: City of David

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, Saint Joseph Seeks a Lodging in Bethlehem
classics.sourceNotes: This Bethlehem scene gives the city card a direct Nativity-era setting.
